r65b_split_xxzz_fb92_guard.description: Dual-channel split gate: high-floor feedback gate with yy/Ka_xx local guard, while SCD gate stays adaptive on xx/zz only.
r65b_split_xxzz_fb92_guard.rationale: First repair move: decouple channels and keep feedback close to Round61 on protected paths; reserve adaptation mainly for xx/zz SCD suppression.

selection.note: No useful repair signal; protected regression remains vs Round61: [{'metric': 'dKg_xy', 'delta': 1.2980100325168618}, {'metric': 'dKg_yy', 'delta': 2.2418043477112413}, {'metric': 'dKa_xx', 'delta': 1.2766773016595163}, {'metric': 'rx_y', 'delta': 0.23092080309376062}]

r65b_split_xxzz_fb96_frozen.description: More frozen feedback channel (floor=0.96) with stronger adaptive xx/zz SCD gate.
r65b_split_xxzz_fb96_frozen.rationale: Stress-test whether most regressions came from feedback-path gate drift; keep feedback near baseline and move adaptation burden to xx/zz SCD only.

selection.note: No useful repair signal; protected regression remains vs Round61: [{'metric': 'dKg_xy', 'delta': 1.2980849932881071}, {'metric': 'dKg_yy', 'delta': 2.139571446677728}, {'metric': 'dKa_xx', 'delta': 1.2649403213828965}, {'metric': 'rx_y', 'delta': 0.23082418061353493}]

r65b_split_xxzz_fb94_rxguard.description: Split gate with moderate feedback floor plus a narrow rx_y post-guard.
r65b_split_xxzz_fb94_rxguard.rationale: Keep split-gate body unchanged and test whether a minimal lever post-guard can repair rx_y without broad retuning.

selection.note: No useful repair signal; protected regression remains vs Round61: [{'metric': 'dKg_xy', 'delta': 1.2984697428716387}, {'metric': 'dKg_yy', 'delta': 2.1835366781331285}, {'metric': 'dKa_xx', 'delta': 1.2699700824350177}, {'metric': 'rx_y', 'delta': 0.23071671236312508}]

r65b_split_scale_navonly_guarded.description: Feedback guard kept, SCD remains adaptive but expanded to scale-block nav-only suppression.
r65b_split_scale_navonly_guarded.rationale: Ablation-style check: if xx/zz-only SCD is too narrow, test a bounded scale-block/nav-only version without reopening bias coupling.

selection.note: No useful repair signal; protected regression remains vs Round61: [{'metric': 'dKg_xy', 'delta': 0.696157753441101}, {'metric': 'dKg_yy', 'delta': 1.837406291558647}, {'metric': 'dKa_xx', 'delta': 2.8799292373225054}, {'metric': 'rx_y', 'delta': 0.2644208638327532}]

no_winner_reason: No candidate passed the Round61 clean-win gate under the same dataset; keep Round65-B as probe-only repair evidence.

strongest_signal.name: r65b_split_xxzz_fb96_frozen
strongest_signal.signal: best (still regressive) candidate r65b_split_xxzz_fb96_frozen: dKg_yy Δ=2.139571, dKa_xx Δ=1.264940, rx_y Δ=0.230824, dKg_xx Δ=0.695172, mean Δ=0.143454

next_best_move: Lock feedback gate even closer to Round61 on iter2 protected states (yy/Ka_xx), and run a tighter xx/zz-only SCD alpha ladder (one notch around best candidate) without changing any other knob.
conclusion_line: Round65-B did not produce a useful repair signal or a clean promotable winner over Round61.

mechanism_learning.worked: Dual-channel split gate can decouple feedback and SCD adaptation, and provides direct per-channel diagnostics (feedback gate vs SCD gate logs).
mechanism_learning.not_worked: Even with split channels, finding a configuration that simultaneously repairs yy/Ka_xx/rx_y and improves mainline mean/max/dKg_xx over Round61 remains difficult.
mechanism_learning.structural_or_redistribution: Current evidence should be treated as repair-signal exploration; only clean no-regression improvement qualifies as structural mainline gain.

next_actions.keep: Dual-channel innovation-consistency mechanism and per-channel logs.
next_actions.remove: Shared scalar gate coupling that simultaneously drifts feedback and SCD response.
next_actions.repair_direction: Lock feedback gate even closer to Round61 on iter2 protected states (yy/Ka_xx), and run a tighter xx/zz-only SCD alpha ladder (one notch around best candidate) without changing any other knob.
next_actions.new_mechanism_direction: If repair saturates, try dual-target innovation channels with different target_nis for feedback vs SCD.
